DAX Measures
Shipping Latency: Calculate the difference between Order Date and Shipping Date. This helps identify bottlenecks in your fulfillment.
Total Profit: Since you have Profit per Unit and Quantity Purchased, you’ll need a calculated column or measure:
{Total Profit} = {Profit per Unit} * {Quantity Purchased})
Discount Impact: Compare Order Item Discount against Quantity Purchased to see if deep discounts actually drive volume or just kill your margins.
KPI Cards: Total Sales, Total Profit, Average Shipping Days, and Total Orders.
Sales by Region: A Map or Bar Chart showing where the money is coming from.
Sales Trend: A Line Chart using Order Date to see seasonality (e.g., "Do we spike in Q4?").
Shipment Type Performance: A Donut chart showing the split between Express, Standard, etc.
Delivery Speed by Region: A Matrix or Heatmap showing which regions suffer from slow shipping.
Profitability vs. Shipping Type: Are you losing all your profit on "Free Express Shipping"?
Product Type Breakdown: A Treemap showing which categories dominate sales.
Profitability Scatter Plot: Plot Sales per Order on the X-axis and Profit on the Y-axis. This identifies "Stars" (High Sales/High Profit) and "Dogs" (High Sales/Low Profit).
Discount vs. Sales: A correlation chart to see if your discounts are actually working.
